Global Variable# FFERR_DEVICEFULL

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_DEVICEFULL: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_devicefull#Discussion)

The device is full.
